query:
SELECT p.id, p.quotationId, p.advanceAmount, p.advanceReceiptUrl, q.total as quotation_total 
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN quotations q ON p.quotationId = q.id 
WHERE p.id = 90001;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT p.id, p.quotationId, p.advanceAmount, p.advanceReceiptUrl, q.total as quotation_total 
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN quotations q ON p.quotationId = q.id 
WHERE p.id = 90001;
